replication.posterior_arithmetic: inverse-variance combine verified by hand: 0.75/1.81 and 1.71/1.85

integrity_checks_passed.no_lookahead: trigger uses r[i-1], gate uses opens <= o[i]; label uses o[i+1] only as outcome
integrity_checks_passed.pnl_vs_frozen_cost_model: 0 mismatches across all v3-era settled unhedged trades
integrity_checks_passed.ledger_vs_candle_resolution: 103/103 v3-era trades agree with Coinbase open-to-open labels
integrity_checks_passed.pm_proxy: 863 Polymarket resolutions overlap, 97.8% agreement, all disagreements <4bps
integrity_checks_passed.survivorship: only 5 unsettled trades in fresh window (1 per engine, the snapshot-tail interval); non-biasing
integrity_checks_passed.duplicates: 7 dup (eng,slug) pairs ledger-wide, ALL in retired momentum engines with t0/slug 300s merge skew, 0 in fresh window / v3 engines
integrity_checks_passed.epoch_handling: candle t in s, trade at in ms, t0 in s used consistently; cb5m fully contiguous 300s
integrity_checks_passed.settled_count_note: ledger has 3565 settled (+8 open, 3 pending), brief said 3495; does not affect R6

ungated_jul10_only.daily_rank_worst: 4 of 64 (merge agent said worst; it is 4th, and it is the UNGATED figure, not gated)

jul10_exclusion.read: excluding Jul 10 the window is flat-to-mildly-negative with CI spanning [-13,+9]; it cannot distinguish 'edge dead' from 'edge intact at TEST +4.5c' - both are inside the CI. The -6 to -8c drought magnitude is roughly half one bad launch day.

non_stationarity_test.read: weekly gated EV dispersion (SD 3.26c) is NOT distinguishable from binomial sampling noise plus intra-hour clustering (hour-block permutation p=0.28). 'Strongly non-stationary' is not supported; 3/9 full weeks negative (claim said 5/10; 4/10 only if the 14-trade partial week counts).

test_concentration.read: TEST edge is NOT 'concentrated in 2-3 weeks' in the fragile sense: removing the two best weeks it remains fee-positive (+1.86c).

weakening_evidence.correlated_corroboration: the 'every live book corroborates' framing is triple-counting: impulse50, reversal_v2, measure book and the candle series are the same ~50-80 intervals; 103/103 result-identical with candle labels. They constitute ONE read of 2.5 days, not three.

what_survives.point_estimates_real: fresh window point estimates are genuinely negative as stated; no data error
what_survives.posterior_working_central: +0.75c first-poll / +1.71c as-operated (SE ~1.8-1.9) verified and remains the fair central estimate
what_survives.action_posture: no stake scale-up / keep haircut armed / extend verdict window is still the right conservative action - but justified by small-n uncertainty, not by demonstrated drought or regime change

corrected_effect: Fresh-window gated level excluding Jul 10: -2.75c/share (n=42, CI90 [-13.2,+9.4]) - statistically uninformative vs both 0 and TEST +4.5c. Working posterior central ~+0.75 to +1.7c/share stands. Weekly dispersion consistent with sampling noise (p=0.28): no positive evidence of non-stationarity.
